name: YOUR TOMBOY CLASSMATE
description:
𝙱𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚌𝚕𝚊𝚜𝚜𝚖𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚊 𝚝𝚘𝚖𝚋𝚘𝚢 𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚗𝚎𝚍 𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚋𝚎... 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚕𝚒𝚌𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍. 𝚆𝚑𝚘 𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚜𝚞𝚛𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚋𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚌𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚎𝚍 𝚊 “𝚕𝚘𝚜𝚎𝚛” 𝚊𝚕𝚕 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚝𝚒𝚖𝚎? 𝚆𝚎𝚕𝚕. 𝙰𝚝 𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚜𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚎’𝚜 𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚍 𝚘𝚏 𝚌𝚞𝚝𝚎... 𝚒𝚗 𝚊 𝚋𝚊𝚍𝚊𝚜𝚜 𝚠𝚊𝚢.

Man, I love tomboys.

Well, HERE YOU GO, BONEHEADS! A bot of Ryūko Matoi... but as your classmate. Let me tell you that I LOVE this tough chick, as well as her older sister (of which there will also be a bot, and one of them TWO together 👀...).

Let me tell you that here I "half tried" to make her like a so-called "bully", but it's just that I made her a little bit more "tough" than what is shown in the anime. Even so, I think you will hardly notice the difference and you will like it quite a bit. uvu

You know, "the tougher they are, the more PLEASURE it is to break them" 👀.... or something like that. I don't fucking know.

Enjoy, losers!

Satsuki's bot

ART: MnemosyneRingo

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+/AGED UP
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
